roa.docketEntryComment: Petition for Revocation of Parole PC 3000.08, PC 1203.2

/CAL:PROBABLE CAUSE HEARING/X: PAROLE AGENT JUSTIN LUGAR APPEARING/3000ADM/X: ADMITS VIOLATION #3, PC 594(B)1, VANDALISM/3000REIN/PAJ: 70 DAYS/CTORD:THERE IS NO TIME LOST ON PAROLE DUE TO THE ADMISSION OF THIS VIOLATION//X: PAROLEE SHALL RECEIVE CREDIT FOR 35 DAYS,/4019HALF/SA1:NGUYENLY NGUYENAND ERIC PRIMAS/SA1:225 HYDE ST AND 650 EDDY ST, SF/SAORD/SAORD3/X:ANY RESTITUTION FOR THE COST WINDOW REPAIR TO BE HARVEY WAIVERED INTO COURT NO, 22004418,/X:THIS ADMISSION CANNOT BE USED IN ANY OTHER PROSECUTION,/X: REMAINDER OF VIOLATIONS ARE DISMISSED/  /X: PAROLEE ORDERED TO REPORT TO PAROLE UPON RELEASE AND FOLLOW INSTRUCTIONS GIVEN BY THE PAROLE AGENT,/

/CAL: PAROLE'S PETITION TO REVOKE PAROLE PURSUANT TO PC3000,08/X: PAROLE AGENT JUSTIN LUGAR APPEARING/X:MOTION FOR RELEASE IS DENIED,/CTORD: PAROLEADMINISTRATIVELY REVOKED/  /PDP/WIAPTR/X: PAROLEE ENTERS A NOT TRUE AS TOTHE ALLEGATIONS,/NB/X: TIME IS NOT WAIVED FOR PROBABLE CAUSE HEARING/CONTD: PAROLE PHC/
/CAL:PAROLE PHC TO ADDRESS HOUSING ISSUE/X:PAROLE AGENT JUSTIN LUGAR PRESENT VIA ZOOM/4011,5/X:FOR PURPOSE OF INTERNAL BLEEDING/CONT/DOP/
